name: Moreno Valley Unified School District
districtFact: Moreno Valley Unified School District publishes traditional-year trimester calendars for TK-6 and TK-5 Butterfield Language Academy, with separate official calendars for preschool, Head Start, grades 6-8, and grades 9-12 programs.

about.title: About Moreno Valley Unified School District
about.content: Moreno Valley Unified School District, also known as MVUSD, serves students in Moreno Valley, California, in Riverside County. The district calendar helps families track student return dates, teacher prep days, parent conference days, trimester endings, minimum days, Thanksgiving Recess, Winter Recess, Spring Recess, and the last day of instruction.

about.title: How to Use This MVUSD Calendar
about.content: Use this page for the district's traditional TK-6/TK-5 Butterfield calendar. Families in preschool, Head Start, grades 6-8, or grades 9-12 should check the alternate calendar links and verify school-specific schedules with Moreno Valley Unified.

planningTips.title: Planning Tips for MVUSD Families
content: Confirm which MVUSD calendar applies to your student because preschool, Head Start, middle grades, high school, and TK-6 calendars are published separately.
Parent conference days are listed separately from regular instruction and can affect childcare and transportation.
Minimum days appear at trimester endings and the last day of instruction, so verify dismissal times with your school.
Summer School and Extended School Year dates are listed separately in the official PDFs.

customSections.label: Moreno Valley Unified Calendar Planning Notes
customSections.content: MVUSD calendars are program-specific. This district page summarizes the traditional TK-6/TK-5 Butterfield Language Academy calendar as the main calendar, while the official source also links separate calendars for State Preschool, SDC Preschool, Head Start, grades 6-8, and grades 9-12.

compareIntro: Compare the Moreno Valley Unified calendar with other Inland Empire and Southern California district calendars currently available on MySchoolDates. Dates shown include the first day, last day, and major breaks.

districtFaqs.q: Which Moreno Valley Unified calendar does this page summarize?
districtFaqs.a: This page summarizes the official MVUSD Traditional Year - Trimester Calendar for Grades TK-6 and TK-5 Butterfield Language Academy.

districtFaqs.q: Does MVUSD publish separate calendars for other programs?
districtFaqs.a: Yes. MVUSD also publishes separate calendars for preschool, Head Start, grades 6-8, and grades 9-12 programs.

districtFaqs.q: Does the MVUSD calendar include trimester dates?
districtFaqs.a: Yes. The official calendar lists first, second, and third trimester end dates, along with minimum days tied to those dates.

districtFaqs.q: Where should families verify Moreno Valley Unified calendar updates?
districtFaqs.a: Use the official MVUSD school calendars page and campus announcements for final confirmation. MySchoolDates is an independent reference and is not affiliated with Moreno Valley Unified School District.
